texto: Ten years ago, I still feared loss enough to abandon myself in order to keep things stable. I'd smile when I was sad, pretend to like people who appalled me. What I now know is that losses aren't cataclysmic if they teach the heart and soul their natural cycle of breaking and healing.

seo.descriptionSeo: Citação de Martha Beck sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Since our society equates happiness with youth, we often assume that sorrow, quiet desperation,…

frase_original: Since our society equates happiness with youth, we often assume that sorrow, quiet desperation, and hopelessness go hand in hand with getting older. They don't. Emotional pain or numbness are symptoms of living the wrong life, not a long life.
